transcript.message: Hello, this is an automated emergency call from the Pyros wildfire detection system. We have detected a HIGH risk wildfire threat with 99 percent confidence. I need to relay critical...
We have detected Hydrogen gas. Hydrogen...

I'm attending the emergency service. So when we're done with this, it'll be like, oh, the 911 will receive something like this. So this is technically the 911. That's cool. It gives them all those addresses. Good?
Understood. This is an urgent wildfire alert. We have detected Hydrogen gas, which is extremely flammable with...
